blocks.content: The winter formal came and went. Kit didn't go — not because of Daisy, he told himself, just because formals weren't his thing. Eli went as class president and gave a speech nobody asked for. Savannah went with Marcus. Ryan picked Daisy up in a car that was actually his dad's car and brought her a corsage, which Kit knew because Daisy had told Savannah and Savannah had told Eli and Eli had absolutely not told Kit, who had found out by accident.

He spent that Saturday the way he spent most Saturdays — at home, on AIM, riding his bike in the cold because the cold didn't bother him. He rode past the field without stopping. He did not ride past her house.
hey. you missed a pretty good night
eli said he gave a speech
he absolutely gave a speech. unprompted. the DJ had to take the mic back
you should come to the next one
I said maybe. that's not a no
He read it twice. Set his phone down. Picked it up again. The cursor blinked.
